title: OTC Neuro-Symbolic Reasoning Paper Generation
summary: Successfully created a publication-ready LaTeX paper with BibTeX from the provided paper text and available figures. The paper includes: (1) All 4 figures from <available_figures> properly inserted with correct captions and labels (fig1: OTC Pipeline Architecture, fig2: Dataset Statistics, fig3: Performance Comparison, fig4: Hierarchical Proof-Trace Analysis Accuracy); (2) Complete references.bib file with 11 BibTeX entries (5 fetched from Semantic Scholar API, 6 created manually with verified information); (3) All sections from the paper text properly formatted in LaTeX (Abstract, Introduction, Related Work, Methods, Experiments, Discussion, Conclusion, Acknowledgments); (4) Proper LaTeX compilation with pdflatex and bibtex producing a 14-page PDF (paper.pdf). The paper is formatted for letter paper with 1-inch margins, uses the natbib package for citations, and includes hyperref for URLs. All figures use appropriate placement (figure* for 21:9 aspect ratio architecture diagram, figure for others) with proper width/height constraints. Visual review of all 14 pages confirmed good layout with no overlapping figures or cut-off text. Compilation completed without errors - only minor overfull hbox warnings that don't affect output quality.
